search_feed.title: Sensex today | Stock Market Highlights: Sensex ends 941 points higher, Nifty tops 24,330 on Iran peace deal hopes
search_feed.summary: Sensex, Nifty, Share Prices Highlights: Indian shares advanced on Wednesday, as hopes of a possible ​deal between the U.S. and Iran to end the war ‌pushed crude prices sharply lower, easing some concerns ​over the hit to growth and inflation ⁠in Asia's third-largest economy.
